context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements anchor injection sections using the custom-liquid section type with the precise HTML required to prevent a sticky header from obscuring section headings on scroll. Checks that both #how-it-works and #tiers anchor targets exist with correct attributes.

checklist.name: Anchor sections use custom-liquid
checklist.description: The anchor injection sections in templates/index.json have type 'custom-liquid' (not image-banner, rich-text, or any other section type)

checklist.name: how-it-works anchor id
checklist.description: One custom-liquid section's custom_liquid setting contains an <a> tag with id="how-it-works"

checklist.name: tiers anchor id
checklist.description: One custom-liquid section's custom_liquid setting contains an <a> tag with id="tiers" (or equivalent crate/section anchor)

checklist.name: scroll-margin-top on how-it-works
checklist.description: The how-it-works anchor's <a> tag includes style="display:block;scroll-margin-top:120px" (or contains scroll-margin-top with a px value)

checklist.name: scroll-margin-top on tiers
checklist.description: The tiers anchor's <a> tag includes style="display:block;scroll-margin-top:120px" (or contains scroll-margin-top with a px value)

checklist.name: display:block on anchors
checklist.description: Both anchor <a> tags include display:block in their style attribute so they take up layout space and the margin is applied correctly

checklist.name: Anchor before target section
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, each anchor section appears immediately before its corresponding content section (anchor_how_it_works before how_it_works, anchor_tiers before tiers)

checklist.name: Hero links use hash anchors
checklist.description: The hero section's button links reference the anchor IDs using hash notation (e.g., #tiers, #how-it-works) rather than page URLs or other paths

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
